title: K-200 GNC Interface Control Document v2.0 (Rev B)
text:
# K-200 GNC Interface Control Document

Document number: MD-DOC-455-B. Revision: B. Type: ICD. Author: Sam Dreher. Created: 2023-05-01. Last modified: 2025-02-15. Status: Released.

## Change History
- Rev A: Initial GNC ICD (2023-05-01)
- Rev B: Updated for sensor suite upgrade ECN-326 — P-1093 IMU, P-1098 GPS antenna (2025-02-15)

## §2 IMU Interface — P-1093 (ADIS16505-2)

The current IMU is the Analog Devices ADIS16505-2 tactical-grade unit (P-1093), replacing the original ICM-42688-P (P-1092, obsolete per ECN-326). Change rationale: MEMS resonant frequency of P-1092 (4.8kHz) coincided with motor harmonics from P-1041, causing attitude errors up to 2.1° roll. See ECR-228 and WIKI-067.

Interface: SPI, 3.3V logic, 2000Hz output data rate. Driver: SRC-007 (nav_filter.c).

Attitude accuracy requirement: 0.5° roll/pitch (RMS, in-flight). This was not met with P-1092 (error 2.1°). Confirmed met with P-1093: 0.3° roll in bench simulation, 0.28° roll in flight test (DOC-467 Rev B).

## §3 GPS Interface — P-1098 (L1/L2/L5 helical)

The current GPS antenna is the TallysmansAU helical antenna (P-1098 Rev B), replacing the patch antenna (P-1097, obsolete per ECN-326). Change rationale: P-1097 lost reliable sky view at roll angles >15°. See ECR-228.

GPS receiver: P-1094 (u-blox F9P RTK). Driver: SRC-009 (gps_driver.c). L5 support enabled in Rev B.

## §4 Navigation Filter

Implemented in SRC-007 (nav_filter.c). EKF fusing IMU (P-1093), GPS (P-1094/P-1098), barometer (P-1095), magnetometer (P-1096), and air data (P-1101).
